title: moraea marlothii
intro: Moraea marlothii, also known as the Marloth's sword lily or Marloth's moraea, is a species of flowering plant in the Iridaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Moraea marlothii include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
